languages.text: "Отлично!" {n}В голосе Ювенны просыпается энтузиазм.{/n} "Я позабочусь о том, чтобы они попали к нужным людям и были немедленно использованы".
"Excellent!" {n}Enthusiasm kindles in Juvenna's voice.{/n} "I'll see to it that they reach the right people and are used immediately."
languages.original_text: "Отлично!" {n}В голосе Ювенны просыпается энтузиазм.{/n} "Я позабочусь о том, чтобы они попали к нужным людям и были немедленно использованы".

"Excellent!" {n}Enthusiasm kindles in Juvenna's voice.{/n} "I'll see to it that they reach the right people and are used immediately."
"Excellent!" {n}Enthusiasm kindles in Juvenna's voice.{/n} "I'll see to it that they reach the right people and are used immediately."

languages.text: «¡Excelente!». {n}El entusiasmo se aviva en la voz de Juvenna.{/n} «Me aseguraré de que llegan a las personas indicadas y se utilizan de inmediato».
languages.original_text: "Excellent!" {n}Enthusiasm kindles in Juvenna's voice.{/n} "I'll see to it that they reach the right people and are used immediately."

traits.locale_text: «¡Excelente!». {n}El entusiasmo se aviva en la voz de Juvenna.{/n} «Me aseguraré de que llegan a las personas indicadas y se utilizan de inmediato».

languages.text: “太好了！”{n}尤文娜的声音里燃起了热情。{/n}“我会确保这东西送到合适的人手中，并立即派上用场。”
languages.original_text: "Excellent!" {n}Enthusiasm kindles in Juvenna's voice.{/n} "I'll see to it that they reach the right people and are used immediately."

traits.locale_text: “太好了！”{n}尤文娜的声音里燃起了热情。{/n}“我会确保这东西送到合适的人手中，并立即派上用场。”

languages.text: « Splendide ! {n}La voix de Juvenna vibre d'enthousiasme.{/n} Je veillerai personnellement à ce qu'ils soient remis à qui de droit et mis à profit immédiatement. »
languages.original_text: "Excellent!" {n}Enthusiasm kindles in Juvenna's voice.{/n} "I'll see to it that they reach the right people and are used immediately."

traits.locale_text: « Splendide ! {n}La voix de Juvenna vibre d'enthousiasme.{/n} Je veillerai personnellement à ce qu'ils soient remis à qui de droit et mis à profit immédiatement. »

languages.text: "Mükemmel!" {n}Juvenna'nın sesinde bir heves beliriyor.{/n} "Doğru kişilere ulaşmasını ve derhâl kullanılmasını sağlayacağım."
languages.original_text: "Excellent!" {n}Enthusiasm kindles in Juvenna's voice.{/n} "I'll see to it that they reach the right people and are used immediately."

traits.locale_text: "Mükemmel!" {n}Juvenna'nın sesinde bir heves beliriyor.{/n} "Doğru kişilere ulaşmasını ve derhâl kullanılmasını sağlayacağım."

languages.text: "Ausgezeichnet!" {n}Begeisterung mischt sich in Juvennas Stimme.{/n} "Ich sorge dafür, dass sie die richtigen Leute erreichen und umgehend eingesetzt werden."
languages.original_text: "Excellent!" {n}Enthusiasm kindles in Juvenna's voice.{/n} "I'll see to it that they reach the right people and are used immediately."

traits.locale_text: "Ausgezeichnet!" {n}Begeisterung mischt sich in Juvennas Stimme.{/n} "Ich sorge dafür, dass sie die richtigen Leute erreichen und umgehend eingesetzt werden."

languages.text: 「素晴らしい！」{n}ジュベナの声に熱意がこもる。{/n}「届ける相手と、すぐに使う相手を、私は見つけるわ。」
languages.original_text: "Excellent!" {n}Enthusiasm kindles in Juvenna's voice.{/n} "I'll see to it that they reach the right people and are used immediately."

traits.locale_text: 「素晴らしい！」{n}ジュベナの声に熱意がこもる。{/n}「届ける相手と、すぐに使う相手を、私は見つけるわ。」
